title: Mu'awiyah Sends His Forces into 'Ali s lbrritories 1198 The Sending of Ziyad to Fars
description: He sent al-Nu' man b. Bashir771 (according to the report of `Ali b. Muhammad [al-MadWini]-'Awanah) with 2,000 men to 'Ayn alTamr,72 where Malik b. Ka'b was on garrison duty773 for `All with i,ooo men. Malik, however, had allowed his men to go to al-Kufah, and when al -Nu'mAn came against him he had only ioo left with him. Malik, therefore, wrote to 'All telling him of the matter of al-Nu'man and his party.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
